calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA N.A., a corporation.
Rosie Delgado, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Andrey N. Todorov.
Default was entered as against defendanton May 27, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 27, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA N.A., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Andrey N. Todorov as follows:

Damages/Principal - $31,766.47.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,436.88.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - $428.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $34,631.35.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
